summary: Frontend-only testing of multi-city SEO landing pages for airport transfers. All 17 features tested successfully.

details: Countries page loads at /countries with countries-page data-testid
Hero title 'Airport Transfers Across Europe' displays correctly
All 6 country sections present: France, Monaco, Germany, Italy, Spain, Armenia
All 12 city cards present and clickable

city_pages_english_urls.details: All 10 city pages load correctly with hero title, vehicle cards, booking form, and popular routes

language_switcher.details: Content properly switches to all three languages

tests: City card click navigates to correct city page
View All Destinations button navigates to /countries

details: Default pickup value pre-filled with city airport
Form submission triggers navigation to car selection

seed_data_creation: None - all data is hardcoded in frontend
context_for_next_testing_agent: All multi-city SEO landing pages tested successfully. 10 city pages created with EN/FR/RU multilingual support. Countries page groups 12 cities by 6 countries. All data-testids are present and functional. Booking form flow works end-to-end.
